landing.title: Ramadan Habit Tracker
landing.subtitle: Build meaningful habits this blessed month. Track your prayers, fasting, Quran reading, and more.

dailyTracker.title: Daily Tracker
dailyTracker.desc: Track your fasting, prayers, Quran reading, and dhikr with ease.

visualCalendar.title: Visual Calendar
visualCalendar.desc: See your progress at a glance with a beautiful calendar view.

insights.title: Insights & Stats
insights.desc: Understand your habits with detailed analytics and streaks.

stayMotivated.title: Stay Motivated
stayMotivated.desc: Get daily encouragement and track your spiritual journey.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode
darkMode.desc: Easy on the eyes during night prayers with dark mode support.

buildStreaks.title: Build Streaks
buildStreaks.desc: Maintain consistency and build lasting habits beyond Ramadan.

landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of Muslims tracking their habits and making the most of this blessed month.

dbMessages.When intentions are pure, even simple de: When intentions are pure, even simple deeds become powerful.
dbMessages.Your effort today may be the reason for: Your effort today may be the reason for mercy tomorrow.
dbMessages.Every moment of self-control is recorded: Every moment of self-control is recorded as a victory.
dbMessages.Allah sees your effort, even when no one: Allah sees your effort, even when no one else does.
dbMessages.Every step you take toward goodness is s: Every step you take toward goodness is seen and rewarded by Allah.
dbMessages.Each sunrise is a new chance to improve: Each sunrise is a new chance to improve for Allah’s sake.
dbMessages.Keep going—Allah never wastes sincere ef: Keep going—Allah never wastes sincere effort.
dbMessages.Small daily actions build a strong conne: Small daily actions build a strong connection with Allah.
dbMessages.Patience during Ramadan brings immense r: Patience during Ramadan brings immense reward.
dbMessages.Allah rewards those who continue, even w: Allah rewards those who continue, even when motivation feels low.
dbMessages.Do not underestimate today’s effort; it: Do not underestimate today’s effort; it may change your akhirah.
dbMessages.A small sincere action done for Allah ou: A small sincere action done for Allah outweighs many done for show.
dbMessages.Discipline today leads to peace tomorrow: Discipline today leads to peace tomorrow.
dbMessages.Allah loves deeds that return to Him aga: Allah loves deeds that return to Him again and again.
dbMessages.Returning to good habits is better than: Returning to good habits is better than giving up.
dbMessages.Allah opens doors for those who keep kno: Allah opens doors for those who keep knocking with patience.
dbMessages.A believer grows through patience, not p: A believer grows through patience, not perfection.
dbMessages.Steadiness in faith is more beloved than: Steadiness in faith is more beloved than sudden bursts.
dbMessages.Even missed days can be forgiven with si: Even missed days can be forgiven with sincere return.
dbMessages.Even on tired days, turning to Allah bri: Even on tired days, turning to Allah brings light to the heart.
dbMessages.Your daily commitment is a silent dua an: Your daily commitment is a silent dua answered in time.
dbMessages.Your struggle to stay disciplined is a f: Your struggle to stay disciplined is a form of worship.
dbMessages.A heart that remembers Allah never walks: A heart that remembers Allah never walks alone.
dbMessages.Consistency in worship builds a heart th: Consistency in worship builds a heart that stays close to Allah.
dbMessages.Progress may be slow, but sincerity make: Progress may be slow, but sincerity makes it meaningful.
dbMessages.Every act done for Allah brings unseen b: Every act done for Allah brings unseen blessings.
dbMessages.Each day of effort is a brick in your pa: Each day of effort is a brick in your path to Jannah.
dbMessages.Consistency turns intentions into lastin: Consistency turns intentions into lasting rewards.
dbMessages.Allah loves those who strive daily for i: Allah loves those who strive daily for improvement.
